column6: Provide Personal Interview experience. List out the questions asked in personal interaction round.
column7: Provide the list of technical questions asked during the interview (technical subject related)
column8: Provide the list of programming questions asked during the selection process. Also mention the programming language.

column6:
1)Introduce yourself
 2)Why do you want to join this company?
 3)How do you spend your free time and how it shapes you as a person?
 4)How do you face challenges and explain with an example you faced?
 5)Questions regarding the previous internships.
column7:
Regarding project and live coding questions below on notepad(not code editor):
 1)Write a function to generate all combinations of well-formed parentheses for n pairs.
 Input: n = 3
 Output: ["((()))", "(()())", "(())()", "()(())", "()()()"]
 2)Write a function to rotate an array k steps to the right.
 Input: nums = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7], k = 3
 Output: [5, 6, 7, 1, 2, 3, 4]
 3)Write a function to group anagrams from a list of strings.
 Input: ["eat", "tea", "tan", "ate", "nat", "bat"]
 Output: [["eat", "tea", "ate"], ["tan", "nat"], ["bat"]]
